Build and clean commands for generating the `gen-test-libm` executable using GCC.

# Purpose
The Makefile automates the build process for a software component. It defines the compiler to use with the `CC` variable set to `gcc` and specifies linker flags with `LDFLAGS` set to `-lm`, which links the math library. The target `gen-test-libm` is generated from the source file `gen-test-libm.c` using the specified compiler and linker flags. The `.PHONY` targets `build` and `clean` are defined to manage the build process and clean up generated files, respectively. The `build` target depends on `gen-test-libm`, while the `clean` target removes the generated file `gen-test-libm`.
